overview.Name: Stoneridge Inc
overview.Description: Stoneridge, Inc., designs and manufactures electrical and electronic components, modules, and systems designed for the automotive, commercial, off-highway, motorcycle, and agricultural vehicle markets in North America, South America, Europe, and internationally. The company is headquartered in Novi, Michigan.
overview.Address: 39675 MACKENZIE DRIVE, NOVI, MI, UNITED STATES, 48377
